author: Harry Powell
content: Have been coming to This n That for 8 years now, and I can safely say it's the best curry available in Manchester. If I'm away from Manchester for an extended time, three curries and rice from this n that is the food here that I miss the most. Make sure to ask for a samosa and a mango lassi too. The world would be a better place if more family run places like this could survive.
